source.name: Level 2: 2.3 Test Your Knowledge - Sending Messages from an Action
source.instructions: **How does an action send a text message to the user?**
source.learningObjectives: SWBAT use the dispatcher to send messages from an action
source.guidance: Inside run(), you send text to the user with dispatcher.utter_message(text="Your message here"). The dispatcher (CollectingDispatcher) is the object that delivers messages from your action to the user. You can also use dispatcher.utter_message(response="utter_xyz") to trigger a predefined response.
